name: PokerSolitaire
short_description: Poker Solitaire - a new game that adds puzzle elements to creating poker hands. Make hands, clear them, and aim for high scores! Your strategic options are limitless. In online mode, you can compete with players worldwide! Simple yet profound, experience the world of this new brain game!
detailed_description:
A fresh fusion of Poker and Puzzle! Arrange cards and complete poker hands!

【Game Outline】

Poker Solitaire - a new game that adds puzzle elements to creating poker hands.

The player rearranges 25 cards in 5 rows by 5 columns and completes a role within a row to erase a card, earning points.

This software has a “2-Minute Mode” in which the player aims for a high score within a time limit, and a “Mission Mode” in which the player creates the roles specified one after another and erases them so that the instructions do not overflow.

This is a game with simple controls, yet offers a variety of ways to develop strategies.

【Points】

  • An exhilarating brain game in which players create and eliminate roles!

The point of this game is to enjoy the brain game in which you have to decide how to efficiently use the cards on the table.

The exhilarating feeling you get when you make a difficult card or eliminate more cards as the limit is approaching is addictive!

  • Your strategic options are limitless!

In 2-minute mode, various strategies are possible. You can increase your score by taking advantage of combo bonuses.

In Mission Mode, you can aim for a high score by assessing the situation, such as what instructions are coming next and which instructions to erase first.

  • You can also participate in ranking!

By playing in online mode, you can compete with players around the world for scores.

【How to Play】

(1) After selecting the card you want to move with the Space key, use the WASD key to rearrange the cards.

(2) Select a row by pressing the E key, and press the Space key to confirm the role.

(3) Erase the selected rows to earn points.

Make hands, clear them, and aim for high scores!

【Two Game Modes】

  • 2-Minute Mode

Aim for the highest score in 2 minutes.

Clear the same hand consecutively for combo bonuses.

As the combos continue, bonuses will increase. Create your own strategy!

  • Mission Mode

Create the specified poker hands in sequence. Game over if missions overflow.

Earn bonuses by completing all missions.

The intervals between instructions gradually become shorter and the difficulty level increases.

Complete as many missions as possible while adapting to the ever-changing situation!

Simple yet profound, experience the world of this new brain game!
